'''gagama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumotach|pneumotach]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumotach|pneumotach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gagama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gægæmæth|gægæmæth]] || [[word:gægæmæj|gægæmæj]] || [[word:gægæmæsh|gægæmæsh]] || [[word:gægæmæ|gægæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gagagamath|gagagamath]] || [[word:gagagamaj|gagagamaj]] || [[word:gagagamash|gagagamash]] || [[word:gagagama|gagagama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gagamath|gagamath]] || [[word:gagamaj|gagamaj]] || [[word:gagamash|gagamash]] || [[word:gagama|gagama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gagafmath|gagafmath]] || [[word:gagafmaj|gagafmaj]] || [[word:gagafmash|gagafmash]] || [[word:gagafmaf|gagafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gagamatha|gagamatha]] || [[word:gagamaja|gagamaja]] || [[word:gagamasha|gagamasha]] || [[word:gagamaka|gagamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gagamath|gagamath]] || [[word:gagamaj|gagamaj]] || [[word:gagamash|gagamash]] || [[word:gagama|gagama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gagamathal|gagamathal]] || [[word:gagamajal|gagamajal]] || [[word:gagamashal|gagamashal]] || [[word:gagamakal|gagamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gagamathatha|gagamathatha]] || [[word:gagamajaja|gagamajaja]] || [[word:gagamashasha|gagamashasha]] || [[word:gagamaka|gagamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gagamathan|gagamathan]] || [[word:gagamajan|gagamajan]] || [[word:gagamashan|gagamashan]] || [[word:gagamakan|gagamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gagamathaoro|gagamathaoro]] || [[word:gagamajaoro|gagamajaoro]] || [[word:gagamashaoro|gagamashaoro]] || [[word:gagamakaoro|gagamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
